theme: E4 cycle 5 — close Network-Legibility rubric item 4 (Navigability: 'vault <-> its relationships <-> the full graph is reachable both ways', IA lens) from HELD -> ADDRESSED. /network is complete (bands 1-5, c153); the build mover moves to /vaults/. Plan was 'polish VaultRelationshipBlock + add vault<->graph round-trip cross-links'. Exploration + measurement surfaced that the round-trip's anchor — /vaults/graph — was DOUBLY BROKEN (rendered a blank svg AND loaded '(no data)'), so this cycle became 'make the federation graph actually render, THEN wire the round-trip'. SCOPE EXPANSION operator-ratified at the measurement gate.
register: Tokyo Night dark-first; honest-topology (every edge real + the graph now actually draws the real 40-node/22-edge topology it always claimed); thin client JS (no framework; one inline round-trip script + the existing island); ≤2 fighting colors (cyan --color-link focus stroke + purple --color-primary; the .gov/.rel surfaces stay neutral); motion honors prefers-reduced-motion (focus scrollIntoView falls back to 'auto'); writing-guidelines AVOID honored (the on-page tip 'Select any node to open its vault.' is plain, no adjectives); a11y both modes (decorative svg stays aria-hidden, node nav is pointer-only via non-focusable <g> click handlers, keyboard/AT path = the /vaults/ index).
operator_scope: TWO decisions confirmed at session open: (1) relationship-block = mini-graph + typed list; (2) graph back-path = BOTH clickable nodes + ?focus back-link. THEN, at the measurement gate, TWO MORE after the latent-bug discovery + perf data: (3) vault-detail = TYPED-LIST-ONLY (drop the mini-graph — rendering Mermaid on 40 detail pages caused CLS 0.125 / Perf ~83, at odds with the Perf-100 doctrine; the full graph is one focus-linked click away); (4) KEEP the 3 shared-Mermaid-island fixes in this cycle + flag the scope expansion prominently (they also un-blank 12+ already-deployed concept/docs diagrams). COMMIT-ONLY (the E4 surface bundles its deploy later).

iii_7step.measure: E4 rubric item 4 (Navigability) was HELD: the forward link (relationship block -> /vaults/graph) existed but the 'back' leg (graph -> a vault) did not, and VaultRelationshipBlock dumped its mini-graph as a raw <pre class=mermaid-inline> code block (unrendered; dotted node ids unparseable). Probing the round-trip revealed worse: /vaults/graph rendered an EMPTY svg (no viewBox, 0 nodes) AND was loading the '(no data)' fallback chart. The gates never caught either — gate-7 only checks the .mermaid-container ELEMENT exists, gate-4 found nothing to fail on an empty svg. The graph has been blank since cycle 150 and was never deployed/eyeballed.
iii_7step.orient: Three latent bugs gate the cycle's goal (you cannot navigate a blank graph): (B1) the MermaidDiagram island's render()+innerHTML path measures labels in a detached element where getBBox() returns 0 in this bundle -> dagre collapses to an empty svg; (B2) graph.astro's fs.readFileSync(path.resolve(__dirname,'../../data/vaults_graph.mmd')) misses the file at build (bundled import.meta.url points at the chunk, not the source) -> '(no data)' fallback; (B3) once diagrams actually render, mermaid's dark edge-label text (#ccc on its default #585858 label bg) = 4.43:1, just under AA 4.5. All three are in shared infra (the island renders 12+ concept/docs pages too). Fix the rendering first, then layer the round-trip; deliver clickable nodes via post-render click handlers on non-focusable <g> groups (NOT securityLevel:'loose'+click-href anchors, which would trip axe aria-hidden-focus on the decorative svg).
iii_7step.select: B1 -> render via mermaid.run({nodes:[container]}) (in-place layout in the attached, visible element). B2 -> import the .mmd via Vite '?raw'. B3 -> set edgeLabelBackground:'#1a1b26' in the island's dark themeVariables (light already passed). Round-trip: VaultRelationshipBlock -> TYPED-LIST-ONLY (operator pivot for perf) with display names + a typed label + the forward link carrying /vaults/graph/?focus=<slug>; graph.astro -> a slug->name JSON map + a hidden '<- Back to {vault}' breadcrumb revealed on ?focus + an inline script that polls until g.node EXIST (the 40-node svg renders the shell before its nodes), wires each node (cursor:pointer + click -> /vaults/<slug>/, idempotent via data-rt-wired) and, on ?focus, adds .graph-focus (cyan stroke) + scrollIntoView (reduced-motion safe).
iii_7step.implement: 3 files. site/src/components/islands/MermaidDiagram.astro — render()+innerHTML -> textContent+class mermaid+run(); + edgeLabelBackground:'#1a1b26' (dark). site/src/pages/vaults/graph.astro — fs/path/url import -> 'vaults_graph.mmd?raw'; + a <script type=application/json id=vault-name-map> (slug/name/label per vault); + a hidden #graph-back-link in the hero; + a 'Select any node to open its vault.' tip; + the round-trip <script> (poll-until-nodes, click wiring, focus back-link+highlight+scroll); + scoped .graph-back-link / .graph-tip / :global(.mermaid-container g.graph-focus rect|polygon|path) cyan stroke. site/src/components/sections/VaultRelationshipBlock.astro — removed the broken <pre>/MermaidDiagram mini-graph; typed list (display names via nameOf, .rel-type in --color-text for AA, in/out grouped) + the focus-carrying graph link + scoped styles.
iii_7step.re_measure: build PASS 162pp (no route change); prebuild regen idempotent apart from generated_at (reverted; topology byte-identical). Playwright 65/65 (gate-4 a11y on /vaults/graph + /vaults/Harness.aDNA both green). axe 0 AA BOTH modes (dark gate + ad-hoc light probe on /vaults/graph, /vaults/graph/?focus=, /vaults/Harness.aDNA — throwaway specs, removed). Lighthouse: /vaults/Harness.aDNA Perf 99 / A11y 100 (LCP 1.8s, TBT 0, CLS 0 — fully recovered after dropping the mini-graph); /vaults/graph Perf 90 / A11y 100 (LCP 3.2s, TBT 90ms, CLS 0.004 — the inherent cost of the graph now rendering 40 real nodes vs the prior blank svg).
iii_7step.record: this JSON + cycle log in the session + mission/STATE cascade

change_summary: site/src/components/islands/MermaidDiagram.astro (SHARED) — (B1) render()+innerHTML -> mermaid.run({nodes:[container]}) so layout happens in the attached/visible element (render() measured in a detached element where getBBox()=0 -> empty svg); (B3) added edgeLabelBackground:'#1a1b26' to the dark themeVariables so light edge-label text clears AA (was #ccc on #585858 = 4.43:1). Un-blanks every Mermaid diagram site-wide, incl. 12+ already-deployed concept/docs pages.

site/src/pages/vaults/graph.astro — (B2) replaced fs.readFileSync(path.resolve(__dirname,…)) with a Vite `import graphChart from '../../data/vaults_graph.mmd?raw'` (the fs path missed at build -> '(no data)'); added a slug->{slug,name,label} JSON map (#vault-name-map), a hidden '<- Back to {vault}' breadcrumb (#graph-back-link) revealed on ?focus=<slug>, a 'Select any node to open its vault.' tip, and an inline round-trip <script> (poll until g.node exist, wire cursor:pointer + click->/vaults/<slug>/ idempotently, and on ?focus add .graph-focus + reduced-motion-safe scrollIntoView); scoped .graph-back-link/.graph-tip + a :global focus-stroke (cyan).

site/src/components/sections/VaultRelationshipBlock.astro — replaced the broken <pre class=mermaid-inline> mini-graph (unrendered code dump; dotted ids) with a TYPED-LIST-ONLY render (operator perf pivot — no Mermaid on the 40 detail pages): display-name-resolved in/out edges with a typed label (.rel-type in --color-text), the count line, and the forward link now carrying /vaults/graph/?focus=<vault_slug>; scoped styles.

doctrine_compliance.honest_topology: PASS — the graph now actually draws the real 40-node / 22-edge cited topology it always claimed (it was blank + '(no data)'); every clickable node resolves to a real /vaults/<slug>/; the typed list shows real cited edges; no decorative additions.
doctrine_compliance.two_fighting_colors: PASS — cyan --color-link (focus node stroke + links + arrows) + purple --color-primary (unchanged elsewhere); the focus highlight reuses the link cyan; no new accent; .rel-type is neutral --color-text.
doctrine_compliance.motion_budget: PASS — only the focus scrollIntoView animates, and it falls back to behavior:'auto' under prefers-reduced-motion; no autoplay/parallax; click navigation is instant.
doctrine_compliance.no_marketing_adjectives: PASS — the only new copy is the tip 'Select any node to open its vault. Each vault links back here from its own relationship block.' — plain, no AVOID-list adjectives.
doctrine_compliance.dual_audience: PASS — developers get a real, navigable federation graph + typed edges with types named; newcomers get 'select a node to open its vault' + a 'Back to {vault}' breadcrumb that makes the round-trip obvious.
doctrine_compliance.engine_files_unedited: PASS — skill_iii_cycle / runners / the prebuild generator untouched; only the 3 site files changed. (The Mermaid island IS a shared site component, not an engine/runner — operator-ratified scope.)
doctrine_compliance.dark_first: PASS — BaseLayout dark default; verified both modes (gate-4 dark + ad-hoc light probe); the edge-label fix is dark-specific (light already passed).
doctrine_compliance.a11y_mechanism: PASS — node navigation is pointer-only via click handlers on non-focusable <g> groups; the rendered svg stays aria-hidden (container carries the name) so no aria-hidden-focus violation; the keyboard/AT path remains the /vaults/ index; the '<- Back' breadcrumb is a real focusable <a>.

validation.build: PASS — astro build 162 pages, 0 errors; prebuild regen reverted to byte-identical topology (generated_at date-only churn).
validation.playwright_gates: 65/65 PASS — no route change (no gate edits); gate-4 a11y on /vaults/graph/ AND /vaults/Harness.aDNA/ both 0 WCAG-AA after the edge-label fix; gate-7 (mermaid present), gate-9 (responsive x5) green.
validation.axe_wcag_aa: 0 violations BOTH modes — dark via gate-4; light via ad-hoc @axe-core/playwright probes on /vaults/graph/, /vaults/graph/?focus=Harness.aDNA, /vaults/Harness.aDNA/ (throwaway specs, removed). NOTE the regression caught + fixed mid-cycle: once diagrams rendered, dark edge-labels failed AA at 4.43:1 (concept/triad + the prior mini-graph) -> edgeLabelBackground fix -> 0.
validation.functional_roundtrip: PASS — vault detail: typed list (display names) + no .mermaid-container + forward link = /vaults/graph/?focus=<slug>; graph: ?focus reveals '<- Back to {vault}' (href correct) + highlights exactly 1 node + every node has cursor:pointer + clicking a node lands on /vaults/<slug>/ (verified via throwaway spec, removed).

lighthouse.vault_detail: Perf 99 / A11y 100 — LCP 1.8s, TBT 0ms, CLS 0 (fully recovered after dropping the mini-graph; no Mermaid on detail pages)
lighthouse.graph: Perf 90 / A11y 100 — LCP 3.2s, TBT 90ms, CLS 0.004 (the graph now renders 40 real nodes vs the prior blank svg; the LCP is the client-side Mermaid layout — flagged for a possible decadal/c159 optimization)

network_legibility_self_check.1_node_clarity: HELD — band-2 doctrine (node = your machine + Home.aDNA) unchanged this cycle.
network_legibility_self_check.2_edge_honesty: STRENGTHENED — the graph the honesty claim rests on now actually RENDERS (was blank + '(no data)'); the 22 cited edges are visibly drawn + typed.
network_legibility_self_check.3_local_shared_boundary: HELD — unchanged this cycle (band 2 / the /network page own it).
network_legibility_self_check.4_navigability: ADDRESSED (was HELD) — full round-trip closed: vault detail -> typed relationships (links to each related vault) -> 'View the full graph ->' (focus-linked) -> /vaults/graph shows '<- Back to {vault}' + the node highlighted -> click ANY of the 40 nodes -> its /vaults/<slug>/. Reachable both ways; keyboard/AT path = the /vaults/ index.
network_legibility_self_check.5_join_scent: HELD — c152/c153 own run-a-node + governance; unchanged.

deferred_to_155plus: Network-Legibility measure passes (Diagram-Reviewer / Node-Operator / IA lenses; responsive/mobile; copy tightening) — cycles 155-158.

/vaults/graph LCP/Perf optimization (the 40-node client-side Mermaid layout; Perf 90 vs the prior blank-99) — candidate for the E4 decadal (c159) or a measure cycle; options incl. pre-rendering the svg at build or lazy/in-view render.
E4 decadal close (AAR + Lighthouse + STATE/STR cascade; candidate ADR-033 — the network_edges.yaml overlay / adaptation seam — ratifies at the E4 phase-exit gate per campaign SO #14) — cycle 159.
Home.aDNA upstream of the edge overlay (Hestia coord, post-decadal).

NEW SEED (carried): a light-mode axe loop in gate-4 — gates are still dark-only; the edge-label AA regression this cycle was caught by an ad-hoc light/dark probe, reinforcing the value of making both-modes a permanent gate.
deploy: NOT deployed — commit-only (operator). The whole E4 surface bundles its deploy later. IMPORTANT for that deploy: the shared MermaidDiagram render->run fix means 12+ already-deployed concept/docs pages (currently shipping BLANK diagrams) will start rendering — a net improvement, but eyeball the deployed mermaid surfaces on the next ship. #needs-human: rotate SS_VERCEL_TOKEN (carry-forward).
notes: The headline is the SCOPE EXPANSION: cycle 154 was scoped as 'relationship-block polish + cross-links' but the round-trip's anchor (/vaults/graph) was found doubly-broken (blank render + '(no data)' data) and a third latent bug (dark edge-label AA) surfaced the moment diagrams rendered. Operator ratified keeping all 3 shared-island fixes here (they also un-blank 12+ deployed concept/docs diagrams) and pivoting vault-detail to typed-list-only (Mermaid on 40 detail pages cost CLS 0.125 / Perf ~83 — the full graph is one focus-linked click away). The a11y mechanism was the key engineering call: clickable nodes via pointer-only click handlers on non-focusable <g> groups (keeping the svg aria-hidden) rather than securityLevel:'loose' + click-href anchors, which would have tripped axe aria-hidden-focus and broken gate-4. Net: the federation graph is real for the first time, item 4 (Navigability) closes, all gates green, both-modes a11y clean, vault-detail perf fully recovered. The gates' blind spot (presence-not-content checks for diagrams) is the deeper lesson — flagged.
